title: the king + reeses pieces = craziness (nintendobrad's account is closed)
description:
WATCH V3 OF THIS PLZ!
I uploaded this because for some reason nintendobrad's account is closed

nintendobrad's original description:
Wow. I don't think I'll ever look at those candy-coated morsels the same way ever, ever again. 0_0


This one is a little short, but hey, some of the very best poops are less than 2 minutes long. Also, I made sure there was an even mix of clip splicing and special effects.


The title was inspired by Calculate900s Link + Dinner = Disaster, just to let ya know.



Music: Gusty Garden from Super Mario Galaxy
(i'm not sure if this is the full version -_-)
